name: 05-17-rvv-runtime-avl-multivl-emitc-loop
title: RVV runtime AVL multi-VL EmitC loop
description: Replace the existing multi_vl=unsupported one-VL RVV i32m1 arithmetic EmitC artifact limit with a bounded materialized multi-VL runtime loop driven by runtime n/AVL, preserving RVV extension-family ops and common EmitC route authority.
creator: codex
